question: When did the series that Tyler Ross stars in with Josh Duhamel premier?

prediction.answer: The series that Tyler Ross stars in with Josh Duhamel, "Battle Creek," premiered on March 1, 2015.
hop1_docs: Battle Creek (TV series) | Battle Creek is an American comedy-drama television series that premiered on CBS on March 1, 2015.  Starring Josh Duhamel and Dean Winters, the show followed the mismatched partnership of a police detective and FBI agent in Battle Creek, Michigan.

When in Rome (2010 film) | When in Rome is a 2010 American romantic comedy film directed by Mark Steven Johnson, co-written by Johnson, David Diamond and David Weissman.  It stars Kristen Bell and Josh Duhamel.  It was released by Touchstone Pictures in the United States on January 29, 2010.

Scenic Route (film) | Scenic Route, also known in the UK as Wrecked, is a 2013 American psychological thriller film written by Kyle Killen, directed by Kevin and Michael Goetz, and starring Josh Duhamel and Dan Fogler.  The film premiered at the 2013 South by Southwest Film Festival and was released on August 23, 2013.
Lost in the Sun | Lost in the Sun is a 2015 drama thriller film written and directed by Trey Nelson, and starring Josh Duhamel, Josh Wiggins, Lynn Collins, and Emma Fuhrmann.

Tyler Ross | Tyler Ross (born March 13, 1989) is an American actor best known for playing Kyle Stansbury in season four of the television series "The Killing" and for starring in the Stephen Cone films "The Wise Kids" (2011), "Henry Gamble's Birthday Party" (2015), and "Princess Cyd" (2017).  Ross has also appeared in the series "Boss", "NCIS", "Major Crimes", "Crash & Bernstein", and "Battle Creek", and the films "Officer Downe" (2016) and "American Milkshake" (2013).

Fire with Fire (2012 film) | Fire with Fire is a 2012 American action film directed by David Barrett starring Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis and Rosario Dawson.  Duhamel plays a firefighter forced to confront a neo-Nazi murderer.  The film was released straight to DVD and Blu-ray Disc on November 6, 2012.

Dean Winters | Dean Gerard Winters (born July 20, 1964) is an American actor.  He is known for his role as Ryan O'Reily on the HBO prison drama "Oz", and has also appeared on such television series as "Rescue Me", "30 Rock", and "", as well as the character "Mayhem" in a series of Allstate Insurance commercials.  Winters co-starred with Josh Duhamel in one season of the CBS Network cop drama series "Battle Creek".

Heavily inspired by Ram Gopal Varma's 1995 Indian film "Rangeela", the film follows a small-town girl (Bosworth) who wins a contest for a date with a male celebrity (Duhamel), and a love triangle forms between the girl, the star, and the girl's best friend (Grace).
